sections.text: Your first steps are familiar: punch trees, gather stone, mine iron. GregTech does change some vanilla recipes, so keep an eye on JEI. Buckets, for example, require plates instead of ingots.

Wrought Iron is your first material upgrade. Smelt Iron Nuggets in a furnace to get Wrought Iron Nuggets, then combine them back. GregTech tools made from Wrought Iron have 50% more durability than regular Iron tools.
